# Vibe Annotations

> Visual feedback tool for web development. Annotate elements, make design tweaks, and share with AI coding agents via MCP.

## Documentation

- [Overview](https://vibe-annotations.com/docs)
- [Installation](https://vibe-annotations.com/docs/installation)
- [MCP Setup](https://vibe-annotations.com/docs/mcp-setup)
- [Workflows](https://vibe-annotations.com/docs/workflows)
- [Architecture](https://vibe-annotations.com/docs/architecture)
- [Troubleshooting](https://vibe-annotations.com/docs/troubleshooting)

## Quick Start

1. Install browser extension from Chrome Web Store
2. Open a localhost page, click Annotate, click any element
3. Copy & paste into AI chat, or install MCP server:

```
npm install -g vibe-annotations-server
vibe-annotations-server start
claude mcp add --transport http vibe-annotations http://127.0.0.1:3846/mcp
```

## Links

- GitHub: https://github.com/RaphaelRegnier/vibe-annotations
- Chrome Web Store: https://chromewebstore.google.com/detail/gkofobaeeepjopdpahbicefmljcmpeof
- NPM Server: https://www.npmjs.com/package/vibe-annotations-server
